mapper.select: SELECT * FROM media WHERE media_id = #{mediaId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO media (file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_ext, media_type, width, height, title, alt_text, upload_user_id, upload_user_name) VALUES (#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{fileExt}, #{mediaType}, #{width}, #{height}, #{title}, #{altText}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName})
mapper.update:
UPDATE media
title = #{title}, alt_text = #{altText},
WHERE media_id = #{mediaId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE media SET deleted = 1 WHERE media_id = #{mediaId}
